case_title: CALIFORNIA TECHNICAL CONTRACTING VS YEARBOOK ASSOCIATES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,416.00 FILED BY CALIFORNIA TECHNICAL CONTRACTING AS TO DEFENDANT YEARBOOK ASSOCIATES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA TECHNICAL CONTRACTING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YEARBOOK ASSOCIATES $1,434.00 PRINCIPAL, $33.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,467.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT YEARBOOK ASSOCIATES
